login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in with your email and password.
login.trialBannerTitle: Your account is a trial account.
login.trialBannerBody: Please use email forwarding to process orders. Web login is not available during the trial period.
login.trialBannerHint: Forward order emails to your assigned address.

errors.account_inactive: Your account is deactivated. Please contact your administrator.
errors.tenant_inactive: Your tenant is deactivated. Please contact platform support.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account with the email address {email} exists, you will shortly receive an email with a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.sessionFailed: Session could not be established. Please request a new link.
errors.invalidLink: Invalid reset link. Please request a new link.

acceptInvite.title: Accept invitation
acceptInvite.descriptionWithTenant: You have been invited to {tenant}. Set your password to activate your account.
acceptInvite.descriptionPlain: Set your password to activate your account.
acceptInvite.successDescription: Your account has been set up successfully. You will be redirected to the dashboard...

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.sessionFailed: Session could not be established. Please request a new invitation.
errors.invalidLink: Invalid invitation link. Please request a new invitation.
errors.noSession: No valid session. Please use the link from your invitation email.
errors.accountSetupFailed: Account could not be set up. Please try again.

empty.title: No orders yet
empty.description: Upload your first order or forward an email.

tenantLanguage.title: Language / Sprache
tenantLanguage.description: Default UI language for all users of this tenant. Individual users can override this preference.
tenantLanguage.helperAdmin: This setting applies to all users of your tenant, unless they have chosen a personal language.
tenantLanguage.helperNonAdmin: Only administrators can change this setting.
tenantLanguage.loadConnectionError: Connection error while loading the language.
tenantLanguage.saveSuccess: Language saved. The change takes effect on the next navigation.
tenantLanguage.saveConnectionError: Connection error while saving the language.

userLanguage.title: Language / Sprache
userLanguage.description: Personal UI language. Your setting overrides your tenant's default language.
userLanguage.helper: Choose "Use company setting" to follow your tenant's language.
userLanguage.loadConnectionError: Connection error while loading the language.
userLanguage.saveSuccess: Language saved. The change takes effect on the next navigation.
userLanguage.saveConnectionError: Connection error while saving the language.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeBack: Welcome back, {name}. Here is an overview of your workspace.
dashboard.welcomeBackNoName: Welcome back. Here is an overview of your workspace.
